tasks.label: Deploy per-user view-once fix
tasks.command: scp -P 2222 -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no database.py root@161.97.182.73:/opt/frogtalk/database.py && scp -P 2222 -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no routers/dms.py root@161.97.182.73:/opt/frogtalk/routers/dms.py && scp -P 2222 -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no static/js/dms.js root@161.97.182.73:/opt/frogtalk/static/js/dms.js && ssh -p 2222 -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@161.97.182.73 "systemctl restart frogtalk && systemctl is-active frogtalk"
